decision_reasons: v3 soft/valid-region support is substantially larger than v2 hard ownership support
duplicate hard ownership remains resolved through component_ownership_map
empty slots remain strictly empty and existing slots retain component/depth valid support
raw component OR/max still reproduces sample-level union targets

input_evidence.25_13_route_decision: C. return to generator/label schema; do not continue loss tuning
input_evidence.25_13b_main_conclusion: 25.13 target-v2 collapse is not caused by empty v2 components or broad generator corruption; the current hard binary component-local labels are too sparse/unsupported for stable mask learning, so derive label schema v3 soft/valid-region targets in PINN_project before any further training.
input_evidence.25_13b_route_decision: A. enter 25.14 label-v3 derivation + validator, no training

component_depth_target_v3.role: foreground-only component depth target; boundary/context does not create fake depth
component_depth_target_v3.rule: raw component depth retained only on raw foreground with component_depth_valid_region_mask

component_mask_target_v3_soft.role: soft component-local mask supervision that retains boundary/context support without hard duplicate ownership
component_mask_target_v3_soft.rule: owned pixels=1.0, raw component pixels=0.8, one-pixel dilation band=0.5, two-pixel dilation band=0.25

component_ownership_map.role: hard assignment for non-duplicated ownership diagnostics and hard evaluation targets

component_sdf_target_v3.role: shape-support target robust to thin binary foregrounds
component_sdf_target_v3.rule: positive-inside and negative-outside signed distance from raw_component_mask_raw, clipped to [-1, 1]

component_valid_region_mask.role: restrict mask/SDF supervision to local support instead of full-grid background
component_valid_region_mask.rule: two-pixel dilation around each raw component mask

contact_boundary_mask.rule: pixels where one-pixel dilated raw components touch without raw overlap

overlap_region_mask.rule: pixels where at least two raw component masks are positive

raw_component_mask_raw.role: preserve original per-component binary support before ownership cuts

label_schema_v3_design.storage_policy: 25.14 derives and validates these targets in memory only; no data/NPZ write.

union_from_components_rule.depth: max over raw component depth grids for hard evaluation
union_from_components_rule.mask: OR over raw component masks for hard evaluation

label_v3_derivation_main_conclusion: Label-v3 can be derived inside PINN_project from existing raw component masks/depths: hard ownership remains unique, union/depth invariants remain intact, and soft/local valid-region support substantially increases the component-mask learning signal that collapsed under target-v2.

label_v3_support_audit.soft_overlap_policy: soft targets may overlap; duplicate hard ownership remains controlled by component_ownership_map

route_decision: A. enter 25.15 label-v3 training gate using 25.10 loss mainline + label-v3 supervision; do not use the 25.11/25.12 rebalance stack
